chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ طَلَّقَ لِغَيْرِ الْكِتَابِ وَ السُّنَّةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 4 – The one who divorces to other than the Book and the Sunnah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/103)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/103)
text: قَدِمَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) بِالْكُوفَةِ فَقَالَ إِنِّي طَلَّقْتُ امْرَأَتِي بَعْدَ مَا طَهُرَتْ مِنْ مَحِيضِهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ أُجَامِعَهَا فَقَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) أَشْهَدْتَ رَجُلَيْنِ ذَوَيْ عَدْلٍ كَمَا أَمَرَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَقَالَ لَا فَقَالَ اذْهَبْ فَإِنَّ طَلَاقَكَ لَيْسَ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ .

en.hubeali: Sahl, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sama’at, from Umar Bin Yazeed, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,

‘A man came over to Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> at Al-Kufa, so he said, ‘I divorced my wife after she was clean from her menstruation, before I slept with her’. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Did you get two just witnesses just as Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic had Commanded?’ So he said, ‘No’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Go, for your divorce is not with anything’.
en.sarwar: 14. Sahl has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sama‘ah from ‘Umar ibn Yazid from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Once, a man in al-Kufah came to ’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and said, ‘I have divorced my wife after she became clean from her Hayd (menses) and before I went to bed with her.’ ’Amir al- Mu’minin asked, ‘Did you ask two just men to witness as Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, has commanded to do?’ He replied, ‘No, I did not do so.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Your divorce in not valid.’”
